plugins.cameraPermission: Heart Rate Monitor uses your camera to detect subtle colour changes in your face caused by blood flow, to estimate your heart rate. No video is stored on our servers.
plugins.microphonePermission: Microphone access is required for video recording. Audio is not processed or stored.

infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Heart Rate Monitor uses your camera to detect subtle colour changes in your face caused by blood flow, to estimate your heart rate. No video is stored on our servers.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Microphone access is required for video recording. Audio is not processed or stored.
